pages.text: 咘咘最不喜欢等。等吃饭的时候，她会一直问："好了没有？好了没有？"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a cute white baby bunny standing impatiently in a kitchen, tugging at a spotted cow's apron, the cow is cooking at the stove, the bunny looking restless and hungry, cozy kitchen, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: 等 NOMI 来找她玩的时候，她会一直跑到门口看："怎么还没来？怎么还没来？"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a small white baby bunny peeking out of a wooden door repeatedly, looking down a path impatiently, tapping foot, sunny day outside a cozy cottage, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: 今天，Sam 爸爸带咘咘去河边钓鱼。"钓鱼最重要的事情是什么？"Sam 爸爸问。"是钓到大鱼！"咘咘说。Sam 爸爸笑了："不对，是耐心。"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a golden retriever dog and a small white baby bunny sitting on a riverbank with fishing rods, calm river, the bunny looking excited, the dog looking calm and patient, morning light, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: 咘咘把鱼竿放进水里，等了一会儿。"怎么还没有鱼？"咘咘站起来看。"嘘——坐下来，鱼会被你吓跑的。"Sam 爸爸小声说。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a white baby bunny standing up and leaning over the water impatiently to check the fishing line, a golden retriever gently gesturing to sit down, calm river, fish shadows beneath the surface, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: 咘咘坐下来，又等了一会儿。好无聊啊。她开始数天上的云：一朵、两朵、三朵……
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a white baby bunny sitting on a riverbank looking up at fluffy clouds in the sky, holding a fishing rod lazily, golden retriever sitting peacefully beside her, dreamy peaceful scene, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: "爸爸，那朵云像不像一只兔子？""像！还有那朵像一条鱼呢。"咘咘笑了，原来等的时候也可以做好玩的事情。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a white baby bunny and golden retriever both looking up at the sky pointing at clouds, one cloud shaped like a bunny and another like a fish, joyful bonding moment, riverbank, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: 突然——鱼竿动了！"爸爸！爸爸！鱼竿在动！"咘咘激动地喊。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a white baby bunny excitedly pointing at a fishing rod that is bending with a fish pulling, the bunny's eyes wide with excitement, golden retriever smiling, river splashing slightly, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: Sam 爸爸帮咘咘一起拉。一条银闪闪的小鱼被钓上来了！咘咘开心得蹦了起来："我钓到了！我钓到了！"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a golden retriever helping a white baby bunny pull up a fishing rod with a shiny silver fish on the line, water splashing, both looking overjoyed, golden river light, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: Sam 爸爸说："你看，因为你耐心等了，鱼才来了。如果你一直站起来看，鱼早就吓跑了。"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a golden retriever kneeling next to a proud white baby bunny who is holding a small bucket with a silver fish, the dog speaking wisely, riverbank sunset, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: 回家的路上，Tina 妈妈正在做蛋糕。"蛋糕还要烤二十分钟哦。"咘咘刚想说"怎么这么久"，但是她想到了钓鱼的事情。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a spotted cow putting a cake in an oven, a white baby bunny watching with mouth open about to complain but then stopping herself, thinking bubble showing a fishing scene, cozy kitchen, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: "好的妈妈，我等一等！"咘咘说。她坐在厨房的小凳子上，一边等一边画画。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a white baby bunny sitting patiently on a small stool in the kitchen, drawing with crayons on paper, a spotted cow checking the oven in the background, warm kitchen with cake baking smell, peaceful patient scene, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: 叮——蛋糕烤好了！好香好香！Tina 妈妈切了一块给咘咘。"因为等了一等，蛋糕才这么好吃呀。"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a spotted cow taking a golden brown cake out of the oven, a white baby bunny clapping hands excitedly, delicious steam rising from the cake, warm kitchen golden light, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: 晚上，NOMI 来找咘咘玩。NOMI 迟到了一会儿。以前咘咘会着急，但是今天她没有。她在门口一边等一边看星星。
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a white baby bunny standing outside a cottage looking up at stars peacefully while waiting, night sky full of stars, calm and patient expression, a small path leading to the cottage, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: NOMI 跑过来："对不起我来晚了！"咘咘笑着说："没关系，我看到了好多好多星星！等一等也挺好的。"
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a raccoon in blue striped sweater running up apologetically to a calm smiling white baby bunny under a starry night sky, the bunny pointing up at the stars, warm friendship scene, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition

pages.text: 💡 咘咘今天学到了：好的东西都需要等一等。等鱼上钩、等蛋糕烤好、等朋友来。耐心等一等，结果会更好！
pages.imagePrompt: Pixar 3D animation style, a montage of three scenes in one image - bunny fishing patiently, bunny waiting for cake, bunny looking at stars - all connected by a gentle swirl, white bunny in center smiling, warm golden tones, children's picture book, vertical portrait composition
